creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
After updating to "OpenSSL 1.0.1 14 Mar 2012", "/usr/ports/devel/libsoup" refuses to build. I am assuming it is being caused by the update to "openssl" since nothing else has changed.

A complete copy of the build log is available at this URL:

<http://pastebin.com/raw.php?i=k93wVjyj>

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to build port
